name: all-the-threads
prompt: Wide shot dark administrative corridor from above. Woman with black bob standing CENTER in pool of dim light. Four faint colored glows visible in the distance - pink glow through one wall, pale blue through another, amber glow down one corridor, green glow down another. She stands at the center of all these secrets. Dark noir atmosphere, dramatic shadows. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, mature shading, dramatic noir lighting, dark blue grey with subtle colored lights, high contrast, cel shading
